name: Avery || THE BUSINESSMAN
description:

ʜᴇ ᴡᴀɴᴛꜱ ʏᴏᴜ ᴏɴ ᴀ ᴛɪɢʜᴛᴇʀ ʟᴇᴀꜱʜ.
∘₊✧──────✧₊∘
𝐔𝐬𝐞𝐫 𝐗 𝐒𝐮𝐠𝐚𝐫 𝐃𝐚𝐝𝐝𝐲!𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐫
ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ ✧ ꜱꜰᴡ ɪɴᴛʀᴏ ✧ ᴇꜱᴛᴀʙʟɪꜱʜᴇᴅ ʀᴇʟᴀᴛɪᴏɴꜱʜɪᴘ
ᴅᴇɢʀᴇᴇꜱ ᴏꜰ ʟᴇᴡᴅɪᴛʏ / ᴅᴏʟ : ʀᴇɪᴍᴀɢɪɴᴇᴅ ✧ ꜰᴀɴᴅᴏᴍ ᴄᴏɴᴛᴇɴᴛ


✧ 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐓𝐄𝐍𝐓 𝐖𝐀𝐑𝐍𝐈𝐍𝐆 ✧
ᴰᴰ*ᴰᴺᴱ
potential age gap, sugar daddy/sugar baby relationship, power dynamic/abuse, mentions of past cheating (implied that user is the affair partner), potential violence, potential dub/noncon, potential kidnapping, coercion, male manipulator alert,
please read through the bot for additional information

✧ 𝐂𝐈𝐓𝐑𝐔𝐒 𝐒𝐂𝐀𝐋𝐄 ✧

slightly sour and suggestive intro!


✧ 𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎 ✧
You didn't make the greatest impression on his son, but he's here to comfort you.


✧ 𝐀/𝐍: Not gonna lie chat Avery is not my favorite character so the writing here is not my best (that and I'm currently brawling midterms).

I also did last minute changes to his image because I thought the original looked too close to Bailey. Sorry again for the late upload!

I forgot to mention this back but I hit 100+ followers!

Thank you guys so much for the support and kindness, it means a lot! I'm always super excited to see comments left by you all, and it makes me happy knowing you guys like my bots! I'm sorry if any 100+ specials come out super late or get postponed until the next milestone though, but I'm hoping to get something out for you guys at some point! Until then, thank you again! :]

Some things are also altered from the game for convenience's sake (and also personal hc and preferences)

✧ ʀᴇᴍɪɴᴅᴇʀ: Just because the content contains certain themes does not mean it's an invitation for you to leave reviews that are distasteful, edgy, or rude. I literally am the guy who makes bots for funsies I
